content: Phase 3.2 helpers are intentionally split: admin/phase3-2b-propagate.cjs copies an existing specific ai-summary into boilerplate-marked description/JSON-LD fields (idempotent; skips if ai-summary itself contains 'deck plans, live tracker'). admin/phase3-2b-rewrite.cjs accepts a JSON map of path→new_summary, replaces the ai-summary tag, then propagates. Use propagate when ai-summary is good; rewrite when ai-summary is boilerplate.

verification_meta.rationale: Protected operator anchor — household weight signal.
